📄 README.md

@medyll/css-base

A modern, token-driven CSS design system. Override CSS custom properties to create themes without changing HTML structure.

npm install @medyll/css-base
v0.1.21 MIT Tree-shakable Zero dependencies

About

A modern CSS design system with utility classes, design tokens, and component primitives.

css design-system tokens tailwind-like
